LAW AND MOTION 302, ATTY. ROGER TEICH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS JOHNS CREEK SOFTWARE, INC. AND STEPHEN CHEATHAM'S IS GRANTED, FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AS TO ATTORNEY ROGER TEICH. NO OPPOSITION FILED. TO THE EXTENT THE MOTION SEEKS WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY HOWARD NEU, THE COURT REQUIRES A SEPARATE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION OF COUNSEL. THE CASE IS IN THE PROCESS OF BEING TRANSFERRED TO STA. CRUZ SUPERIOR COURT. A COPY OF THE ORDER NEEDS TO BE ATTACHED AND SERVED ON THE CLIENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROGER TEICH, TEL. NO. 948-0045, MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. ROGER TEICH'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS JOHNS CREEK SOFTWARE, INC. and STEPHEN CHEATHAM's IS Granted, for good cause shown as to attorney Roger Teich. No opposition filed. To the extent the motion seeks withdrawal of attorney Howard Neu, the Court requires a separate application and declaration of counsel. The case is in the process of being transferred to Sta. Cruz Superior Court. A copy of the order needs to be attached and served on the client. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
